name: Orange Fizz
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup frozen Florida orange juice concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the thawed orange juice concentrate into a pitcher.
2. Gently stir in chilled carbonated water or tonic water.
3. To serve, pour over ice cubes in glasses.
4. If desired, garnish with quartered orange slices.
5. Serve immediately.
Makes 4 (6-ounce) servings.
Nutrition facts per serving:
73 calories, 1 gram protein, 18 grams carbohydrates, 0 grams total fat (0 grams saturated fat), 0 milligrams cholesterol, 0 grams dietary fiber, 28 milligrams sodium.
Daily Value: 98% Vitamin C, 1% Vitamin A, 37% Folate, 12% Thiamin, 14% Potassium.
